authors.author: Rita Baloche
Rita Baloche
Herr, ich freue mich so sehr über Dich

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I will celebrate, sing unto the Lord, Sing to the Lord a new song. I will celebrate, sing unto the Lord, Sing to the Lord a new song.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: With my heart rejoicing within, With my mind focused on Him; With my hands raised to the heavens, All I am, worshiping Him.
